narrative:
Youngstown City has 34,273 registered voters, with 59.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 37.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 34.0 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +9.1% D−R vs +50.2% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
